name: pff team grades with matchup opponent type param
expected_query: with "current_week_opponents" as (select "h" as "nfl_team", "v" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "season_year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "season_type" = 'PRE' union select "v" as "nfl_team", "h" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "season_year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "season_type" = 'PRE') select "player"."pid", t47ad5654ca693a9d5f883afb95577cd8.grades_offense as pff_team_grades_offense_0, "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "current_week_opponents" on "player"."current_nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."nfl_team" left join "pff_team_seasonlogs" as "t47ad5654ca693a9d5f883afb95577cd8" on "t47ad5654ca693a9d5f883afb95577cd8"."nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" where player.primary_position IN ('TEAM') group by "current_week_opponents"."opponent", t47ad5654ca693a9d5f883afb95577cd8.grades_offense, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
